title: A Conversation with Geek Gamers (solo RPG Friday)
body:
Daniel has an engaging discussion with Deborah from Geek Gamers. They talk about their shared passion for gaming, touching on various topics like wargaming, solo RPGs, and the evolving dynamics between board games and RPGs. Both Daniel and Deborah reflect on their respective channels’ growth and the convergence of narrative-driven experiences, be it through board games or RPGs. They explore specific games such as Dice Throne Adventures, Dungeon Degenerates, Scarlet Heroes, and Four Against Darkness, offering insights into their mechanics, themes, and solo playability.

Deborah also discusses her book, The Solo Game Master’s Guide, emphasizing the importance of narrative over mechanics in solo play. Throughout the conversation, they touch on gaming tools like cards and dice and share their love for storytelling in games.

Modiphius Entertainment
